mnemonics: The 3 Ps of Capacity Planning: Plan for Performance, Provision for Peaks, Predict for the Future
keyPoints: Forecast demand based on historical data and future business initiatives
Analyze current resource utilization (CPU, memory, storage, network)
Plan for scalability and future growth to avoid performance bottlenecks
commonMistakes: Underestimating future growth, leading to rapid resource exhaustion
Focusing only on current usage without planning for peak loads or future projects
